name: HR managers in small to medium-sized companies using Gusto for payroll processing tool
description: For HR managers in small to medium-sized companies using Gusto processing 10–50 employee benefits enrollments/month, missed updates cause compliance issues. We provide automated alerts instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR managers in small to medium-sized companies using Gusto for payroll processing
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking employee benefit enrollment changes in a timely manner.
features: Monthly alerts for benefit enrollment changes
